sentence_reviews.text: Interpretability methods attribute predictions or internal representations to input features, examples, concepts, directions, or learned components.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: PML and AIMA discuss model explanation/interpretability, features, representations, and attribution-style reasoning.
sentence_reviews.notes: The definition is a defensible synthesis; no specific interpretability survey is cited in this packet.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: PML/AIMA support statistical evaluation and model analysis methods.

sentence_reviews.text: Coverage is necessarily incomplete: measured proxies, policies, and test suites cannot enumerate every deployment context or adversary. Its direct dependencies include Statistics & experimental design, Embeddings & distributed representations.
